compiled_state.title: As a host project maintainer, the KNOWN-ISSUES template is installed during onboarding
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Create a generic KNOWN-ISSUES template at `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` and ensure the onboarding pipeline copies it to host projects at `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`.
**Why**: The onboarding skill currently references a template path that doesn't exist, so host projects never get a KNOWN-ISSUES file. Fixing this ensures every onboarded project starts with a structured incident log.
**Scope**:
- IN: Creating generic template at `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` with placeholder incidents and format guidance, ensuring onboarding SKILL.md copy step works with the new path, adding overwrite guard so re-onboarding does not replace existing project-specific KNOWN-ISSUES
- OUT: DSO project-specific incidents (Story A), CLAUDE.md pointer changes (Story C), dso-setup.sh path updates (Story C)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` exists as a generic template with placeholder incidents and incident format guidance
  ← Satisfies: "The onboarding template pipeline works end-to-end"
- When this story is complete, running the onboarding skill against a host project copies the template verbatim to `.claude/docs/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`
  ← Satisfies: "onboarding copies it as a verbatim copy to host projects"
- When this story is complete, re-running onboarding on a project with an existing KNOWN-ISSUES.md does not overwrite it
  ← Addresses scenario analysis finding: "Host project KNOWN-ISSUES overwritten on re-onboarding"
- Unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Overwrite guard for re-onboarding — check file existence before copy
- [Maintainability] Template incident format must match the project-specific file format (Story A)
- [Maintainability] Two onboarding paths install KNOWN-ISSUES: interactive onboarding (SKILL.md line 1302) and scripted setup (dso-setup.sh lines 196-201). This story addresses the SKILL.md path; Story C handles the dso-setup.sh path update.
